scenario: Scenario: Chat message produces real file diffs in the changes view
note: Uses semantic selectors — regenerate with 'npm run generate' if UI labels change

steps.description: Type "build the project" in the chat input
Verify there is a response in the chat
commands: # ASSERT_VISIBLE: I'll help you build the project. Here are the changes:

steps.description: Verify the changes view shows modified files
Click on "index.ts" in the changes list
Verify a diff editor opens with the modified content
Press Escape to close the diff editor
